name: G & P Pawn Brokers
description_short: G & P Pawn Brokers is a pawn shop located in the High Bridge neighborhood of Bronx, NY, offering collateral-based loans, buying, and selling of merchandise including jewelry, firearms, and electronics.
description_long: G & P Pawn Brokers operates as a traditional pawn shop in the High Bridge section of Bronx, New York, at 28 E Mount Eden Ave. The business is listed in the pawn shops category and serves the local community as a collateral-based lending and merchandise trading operation. Like other pawn brokers, the company functions as an alternative financial service provider for consumers seeking quick access to cash. The business has been indexed in local business directories and operates under a standard pawn shop model. G & P Pawn Brokers offers a diverse range of services centered on buying, selling, pawning, and lending against personal property. Their inventory and service offerings span jewelry (including pre-owned and diamond items), firearms (handguns, rifles, pistols, new and used guns), electronics (stereos, car audio systems, laptops), precious metals (gold, silver, silverware, scrap gold), tools, and used merchandise. They also provide ancillary services such as jewelry repair, check cashing, layaway options, and title pawns. The breadth of their catalog suggests they accept a wide variety of collateral types. G & P Pawn Brokers distinguishes itself through multiple service channels and merchandise categories. Their willingness to handle firearms, jewelry repair, and check cashing indicates specialized expertise. The listing of services like estate liquidation, estate sales, and gunsmithing suggests they serve clients with specific needs beyond basic pawn transactions. However, the company profile lacks substantial independent verification—there are no customer reviews published on their Hubbiz listing, no details about loan terms, interest rates, or operational hours, and no independent third-party ratings available. The business appears minimally engaged with its online presence, operating primarily as a traditional brick-and-mortar pawn shop. Consumers considering G & P Pawn Brokers should recognize that pawn loans involve surrendering physical collateral and carry interest costs, making them suitable primarily for short-term cash needs rather than long-term borrowing. The lack of published customer feedback means borrowers cannot easily assess service quality, fairness of appraisals, or customer satisfaction before visiting.

diagnosis: G & P Pawn Brokers is best for consumers in the Bronx needing quick cash against collateral, particularly those with jewelry, firearms, or electronics to pledge. The primary caveat is the complete absence of customer reviews, published loan terms, and online transparency—borrowers should visit in person or call (646) 314-7556 to understand their specific rates and terms before transacting.
